description: Style NoteThe name van heusen is synonymous with style and can be relied upon to craft a timeless formal wear collection. Each piece is sure to add a touch of class to your wardrobe, including this pair of trousers. Pair it with a dark satin blouse and wear a light coloured scarf to give yourself a formal makeover. Black high heels and chic accessories will suffice to complete the look.Product DetailsBeige formal trousers, straight cut, welt pockets at the side, broad waistband, metal zip and button closureMaterial and CarePolyester blendMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fit, stretchThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
